query:
SELECT 
  recipientName,
  recipientEmail,
  digestType,
  status,
  errorMessage,
  sentAt
FROM userEmailSendLog
WHERE digestType = 'thursday_reminder'
  AND sentAt >= '2026-05-14 00:00:00'
ORDER BY sentAt ASC;
